prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for benzaldehyde (14 atoms: 1 O, 7 C, 6 H) using DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Fukui indices (f+, f−, f0, dual descriptor) computed by finite difference of Mulliken charges across neutral, cation, and anion states. Headline value reported is the maximum f+ (most electrophilic site): atom 3 (ring C), f+ = 0.39938962. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f− = 0.23839906. Charge conservation: sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000 — both checks passed. integrity.trustworthy = true. No warnings reported by the engine (warnings array empty).
